# Jean Riley — San Diego Realtor®

> A boutique San Diego real estate practice. Jean Riley is a Realtor® with Jeanify (DRE# 02004228), with 200+ verified Zillow closings. She specializes in single-family homes, commercial property and 1031 Exchange across San Diego's coastal corridor. Bilingual: English, Mandarin (中文), and Taiwanese (台語).

## Agent

- **Name:** Jean Riley
- **Brand:** Sold by Jean / Jeanify
- **Brokerage:** Jeanify
- **License:** DRE# 02004228 (California)
- **Phone:** (858) 598-3888
- **Email:** Jean@CentermacSD.com
- **Office:** 9888 Carroll Centre Rd, Ste 200, San Diego, CA 92126
- **Languages:** English, Mandarin (中文), Taiwanese (台語)
- **Recognition:** San Diego "Rising Star" Real Estate Agent

## Specialties

- Single-family residential homes (primary)
- Commercial real estate
- 1031 Exchange (45-day identification, qualified intermediary coordination)
- Property management (tenant placement, maintenance, financial reporting)
- Investment advisory
- Bilingual real estate services for Mandarin-speaking clients

## Areas served

San Diego coastal corridor and inner urban neighborhoods, including: La Jolla, Bird Rock, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Point Loma, Del Mar, Mission Hills, Hillcrest, North Park, South Park, Coronado, Carmel Valley, Mira Mesa, Carlsbad, Rancho Santa Fe, 4S Ranch, Poway, Escondido, Chula Vista.

## Track record

- **200+ verified closings** on Zillow (full record at https://www.zillow.com/profile/JeanSD)
- **5.0 average client rating** across reviews
- **10+ years** in San Diego real estate

Largest recent featured closings (≥ $1M):
- 16208 Via Monterey, Rancho Santa Fe — $2,650,000 (Buy Side, Jan 2025)
- 725 Henderson Ave, Sunnyvale — $2,530,000 (Listing Side, Mar 2025)
- 12451 Carmel Pointe, San Diego — $2,170,000 (Buy Side, May 2024)
- 17134 Monterey Ridge Way, San Diego — $2,050,000 (Listing Side, Nov 2025)
- 6686 Torenia Trl, San Diego — $1,880,000 (Listing Side, Feb 2024)

## Content

- [Home](https://jeanriley.com/): Overview, hero, recent featured closings, 1031 Exchange highlight, client voices, video reel.
- [Featured Homes (sold)](https://jeanriley.com/#/listings): 21 closings ≥ $1M with photos, prices, addresses, side represented (Buy / Listing / Both).
- [About Jean](https://jeanriley.com/#/about): Bio, mission, Jeanify practice services, four-phase process, all client testimonials.
- [Videos](https://jeanriley.com/#/videos): Listing songs, property tours, neighborhood walkthroughs, client voice-overs, agent testimonials. Source: https://www.youtube.com/@soldbyjean
- [Guides](https://jeanriley.com/#/articles): Buyer Guide, Seller Guide, 1031 Exchange Primer.
- [1031 Exchange](https://jeanriley.com/#/exchange): 45-day identification window, 180-day close, 200% rule, FAQ.
- [FAQ](https://jeanriley.com/#/faq): Commission structure, timelines, Mello-Roos, 1031 exchanges, buying from overseas, listing songs.
- [Contact](https://jeanriley.com/#/contact): Contact form and direct contact info.

## Articles

Full-text articles with their own canonical URLs, sources and FAQ sections. These are static
HTML pages (not hash routes) and are the preferred citation targets.

- [What to expect when buying in La Jolla](https://jeanriley.com/articles/buying-in-la-jolla.html): La Jolla (92037) pricing vs. the county, the Coastal Overlay Zone and Coastal Development Permits, bluff/geotechnical diligence, Prop 13 basis reset and the supplemental tax bill.
- [Pre-listing essentials: the seven-point preparation](https://jeanriley.com/articles/pre-listing-preparation.html): How much to spend preparing a home (1–3% of value), item-by-item San Diego costs, staging ROI data, the four-week sequence, and the listing-song marketing piece.
- [1031 Exchange timing — what trips up most investors](https://jeanriley.com/articles/1031-exchange-timing.html): The 45-day and 180-day clocks, the tax-return-due-date trap that shortens the 180, three-property / 200% / 95% identification rules, boot, California FTB Form 3840, and what the One Big Beautiful Bill Act (July 2025) did and did not change.
- [Reading a comparative market analysis](https://jeanriley.com/articles/reading-a-cma.html): CMA vs. appraisal vs. automated estimate, Zestimate median error rates (~1.7–2.4% on-market, ~7.5% off-market), what makes a comparable valid, and how adjustment grids work.
- [Mello-Roos in San Diego: what buyers in 92127, 92130 and 92131 actually pay](https://jeanriley.com/articles/mello-roos-san-diego.html): Community Facilities District tax by area (4S Ranch, Del Sur, Pacific Highlands Ranch, Carmel Valley, Chula Vista), effect on mortgage qualification, bond terms and expiry, and how to verify a specific parcel by APN.
- [Buying San Diego property as an international buyer](https://jeanriley.com/articles/international-buyers-san-diego.html): Foreign national and DSCR mortgages without US credit, FIRPTA withholding rates and thresholds, the $60,000 non-resident estate tax exemption, ongoing ownership costs, and remote-purchase logistics.

## Signature service — listing songs

For every listing Jean takes she commissions an original song written about that specific
property and produces it as a short video for YouTube and social. Not a stock music bed under
a slideshow — an actual song about the actual house. Included at no additional cost to the
seller. Examples: "Song for 12678 Carmel Country Rd, #27" and "Song for 3009 Union Street, #7".

## External profiles

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@soldbyjean
- Zillow: https://www.zillow.com/profile/JeanSD
